redis.clients.jedis.json

Interface RedisJsonCommands

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    RedisModuleCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface RedisJsonCommands
